prompt: Storyboard frame, aspect 9:16, Push'em All gameplay: top-down-ish 3D view of the sandy-green platform (#56a38b) surrounded by vibrant blue water (#2a7dfa), an expanding push-stick sweeping a crowd of bright red stickman enemies (#e3001b) off the edge, several red stickmen mid-air tumbling toward the water. HUD shows progress timeline, coin counter, and a large 'COMBO x4!' overlay in bold yellow. Minimalist 3D with bright contrasting colors and simple stickman-like figures, energetic competitive UI, authentic Push'em All chrome.
